title: Configure Nginx as a reverse proxy for Node.js / Next.js on a VPS
summary: Install Nginx on Ubuntu/Debian, configure it as a reverse proxy to a Node.js or Next.js process, enable SSL with Let's Encrypt via Certbot, and set up process management with PM2.
declaration: I will configure Nginx as a reverse proxy for your Node.js or Next.js application on a VPS (Ubuntu/Debian). This covers Nginx installation, reverse proxy config, SSL with Certbot, and PM2 process management. I'll need your domain name and the port your app runs on before starting.
